metadata.description: Entity-level EBITDA adjustments for the bridge analysis. Separates configuration from engine logic.

entity_adjustments.name: Above-market exec compensation — Meridian
entity_adjustments.support_reference: Executive compensation analysis vs. industry benchmarks
entity_adjustments.rationale: Meridian CEO/CFO compensation $18M above market median for comparable firms.

entity_adjustments.name: Above-market exec compensation — Cascadia
entity_adjustments.support_reference: Executive compensation analysis vs. industry benchmarks
entity_adjustments.rationale: Cascadia founder/CEO compensation $8M above market median.

entity_adjustments.name: Non-recurring: M litigation reserve
entity_adjustments.rationale: One-time litigation reserve for patent infringement case settled in Q3.

entity_adjustments.name: Non-recurring: C delivery center closure
entity_adjustments.rationale: One-time charge for Manila delivery center closure and staff transition.

entity_adjustments.name: Transaction costs — this deal (Meridian)
entity_adjustments.rationale: Meridian-side investment banking, legal, and accounting fees for this transaction.

entity_adjustments.name: Transaction costs — this deal (Cascadia)
entity_adjustments.rationale: Cascadia-side advisory and legal fees for this transaction.

entity_adjustments.name: Related-party leases — C founder properties
entity_adjustments.rationale: Cascadia leases 2 properties from founder entity at above-market rates; $4M annual excess.

entity_adjustments.name: Run-rate: new contracts not at full revenue (Meridian)
entity_adjustments.support_reference: Meridian backlog analysis — contracts signed but not fully ramped
entity_adjustments.rationale: 3 large contracts signed in Q3-Q4 not yet at full run-rate revenue.

entity_adjustments.name: Run-rate: new contracts not at full revenue (Cascadia)
entity_adjustments.support_reference: Cascadia backlog analysis — contracts signed but not fully ramped
entity_adjustments.rationale: 2 BPM engagements ramping to full headcount in Q1-Q2 2026.

entity_adjustments.name: Utilization normalization — M Q2-Q3 dip
entity_adjustments.support_reference: Meridian utilization reports — Q2/Q3 2025 vs. trailing 8-quarter avg
entity_adjustments.rationale: Q2-Q3 utilization dipped to 73% vs. normalized 78%; add-back for temporary bench buildup.

entity_adjustments.name: Offshore labor mix shift — C in progress
entity_adjustments.support_reference: Cascadia workforce planning — offshore migration program
entity_adjustments.rationale: Cascadia migrating 15% of onshore delivery to offshore; $12M annualized savings at completion.

entity_adjustments.name: C attrition normalization 18% → 15%
entity_adjustments.support_reference: Cascadia HR metrics — attrition trending down from 18% to 15% target
entity_adjustments.rationale: Cascadia attrition at 18% vs. 15% industry norm; excess recruiting/training cost add-back.
